title: onobrychis aragatzi
intro: Onobrychis aragatzi, also known as Aragatz clover or Armenian clover, is a perennial plant species belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing coughs, and alleviating symptoms of bronchitis, making it a valued remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Onobrychis aragatzi can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and infusions, often used to treat a range of health issues.
